org.docgene.model

Class AbstractXMLParentArticle

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.docgene.model.AbstractXMLParent
      • org.docgene.model.AbstractXMLParentArticle
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Article, org.docgene.model.globals.PackagedElement, org.docgene.model.globals.RootElement, org.docgene.model.globals.XMLRootElement, HTMLOutput, XMLParent, XMLParentArticle
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    XMLArticle, XMLDisambArticle, XMLFallbackArticle

    public abstract class AbstractXMLParentArticle
extends AbstractXMLParent
implements XMLParentArticle
    An abstract XMLParent article.
